name_en: #BottegaVenetaBottega Veneta Solstice Shoulder Bag, the latest style, comes with a matching small bag inside
name_cn:
#BottegaVenetaBottega Veneta Solstice Shoulder Bag, the latest style, comes with a matching small bag inside
A very casual style 🔥
High-end feel, a quiet and simple bag from the BV show collection, the "Solstice"
Deep green, black, and ice cream colors present different beauties
Paired with jewelry-grade craftsmanship braids, presenting a unique high-end feel under the collision of soft leather and metal
Elegant, casual, and unique
Style No.: 740990
Size: 29*3*52cm
